name: Open-Meteo
description: Free weather forecast API with hourly and daily forecasts, historical data, and climate projections worldwide

name: wttr.in
description: Weather service with simple API returning current conditions and forecasts in JSON, plain text, or PNG formats

name: Aviation Stack
description: Real-time flight status, schedules, airline routes, airports, and aviation data (free tier, no key needed for basic queries)

name: OpenSky Network
description: Live aircraft tracking and flight data including real-time positions, velocity, and altitude of flights worldwide

name: Frankfurter
description: Real-time and historical foreign exchange rates from the European Central Bank — great for travel budgeting

name: ExchangeRate-API (free tier)
description: Up-to-date currency exchange rates for 160+ currencies, no key required for basic endpoint

name: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap)
description: Geocoding and reverse geocoding API — convert addresses to coordinates and vice versa, globally

name: Open-Elevation
description: Free elevation data API — returns altitude in meters for any latitude/longitude on Earth

name: REST Countries
description: Detailed info on every country: capitals, currencies, languages, timezones, flags, calling codes, and borders

name: GeoNames
description: Geographical database covering all countries with cities, postal codes, timezones, and elevation data

name: World Time API
description: Returns current local time for any timezone — useful for knowing local time at a travel destination

name: TimeZoneDB
description: Time zone data by city or coordinates, including UTC offset and daylight saving time info

name: GBFS (Bike Share)
description: General Bikeshare Feed Specification — real-time availability of shared bikes and scooters in hundreds of cities globally

name: Transport for London (TfL) Unified API
description: Live arrivals, disruptions, journey planner, and status for all London transport modes including Tube, bus, and rail

name: SNCF Open Data
description: Real-time French train schedules, disruptions, and station information across France

name: 511 SF Bay (511.org)
description: Real-time transit, traffic, and parking data for the San Francisco Bay Area

name: Global Airport Database
description: Static and semi-live info on 9,300+ airports worldwide including IATA codes, coordinates, and runways

name: Sunrise-Sunset
description: Returns accurate sunrise, sunset, solar noon, and twilight times for any coordinates and date

name: Open Notify (ISS Location)
description: Real-time position of the International Space Station and next pass times over any location — unique travel curiosity tool

name: OpenAQ
description: Real-time and historical air quality data from thousands of monitoring stations in 100+ countries

name: WAQI (World Air Quality Index)
description: Live AQI readings and pollution data for thousands of cities globally — essential for health-conscious travelers

name: USGS Earthquake Hazards
description: Real-time global earthquake data including magnitude, depth, and location — updated every minute

name: CDC Travel Health Notices
description: Up-to-date health and disease outbreak notices for international travel destinations

name: Overpass API (OpenStreetMap)
description: Query OpenStreetMap data live — find nearby hotels, restaurants, ATMs, hospitals, transit stops, and POIs anywhere on Earth

name: Wikivoyage API
description: Free travel guide content for destinations worldwide via the MediaWiki API — attractions, itineraries, and tips
